name: personbio
description: Read and update your Person Bio career profile — résumé, life journey, blog and more — right inside Claude, just by chatting.
long_description: Person Bio turns your résumé and career story into something Claude can read and edit. This desktop extension connects Claude to your Person Bio account over a secure remote MCP server. Ask Claude to show your résumé, add roles and skills, rewrite your summary using a built-in résumé-craft guide, map your career journey, generate a networking self-introduction, or export a clean Markdown résumé — all against your live profile, with your approval on every action. No secrets are stored in the extension: it signs you in with OAuth in your browser.
